Home / Services / Pipe Repair & Replacement

Pipe Repair & Replacement

Reliable pipe repair and replacement services for all types of plumbing systems.

Damaged or corroded pipes can cause a variety of problems, from leaks and low water pressure to contaminated water. Nova Services offers expert pipe repair and replacement services for all types of plumbing systems, including copper, PVC, and PEX. We use high-quality materials and proven techniques to ensure lasting repairs. Whether you need a small section of pipe repaired or a complete repiping of your home, we have the expertise to get the job done right. Homes in older Fresno neighborhoods like the Tower District often have outdated or deteriorating pipes that need to be replaced. We handle all necessary permits and inspections.

Our Process

  1. 01 Step 1: Assess the condition of the existing pipes
  2. 02 Step 2: Recommend the best repair or replacement solution
  3. 03 Step 3: Obtain necessary permits and approvals
  4. 04 Step 4: Install new pipes to meet code and prevent future issues

Benefits

  • Improved water quality
  • Increased water pressure
  • Reduced risk of leaks
  • Extended plumbing system lifespan

Frequently Asked Questions

How do I know if my pipes need to be replaced?

Signs that your pipes may need to be replaced include frequent leaks, low water pressure, rusty water, and visible corrosion.

What type of pipes do you recommend?

The best type of pipe depends on your specific needs and budget. We can help you choose the right material based on your water quality, pressure, and other factors.

How long does pipe replacement take?

The duration of pipe replacement depends on the size and complexity of the job. We'll provide you with a timeline before we begin.

Get a Free Estimate

Ready to get started with pipe repair & replacement? Contact us today.
